Class RecordingAudioProfile

Namespace
WindowsAudioWrapper.Models
Assembly
WindowsAudioWrapper.dll

Holds configuration targets and settings for system audio recording devices.

public sealed class RecordingAudioProfile

Gets or sets APO system enhancement profiles.

CommunicationsDevice

Gets or sets the target default communications recording voice reference block.

Property Value

AudioEndpointReference

ConsoleDevice

Gets or sets the target default console recording device reference block.

public AudioEndpointReference ConsoleDevice { get; set; }

Property Value

AudioEndpointReference

IsAudioEnhancementsEnabled

Gets or sets a telemetry flag stating if device APO switches are active. Ignored in JSON.

[JsonIgnore]
public bool IsAudioEnhancementsEnabled { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

IsChannelVolumeEnabled

Gets or sets a telemetry flag stating if multi-channel balance changes are active. Ignored in JSON.

[JsonIgnore]
public bool IsChannelVolumeEnabled { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

IsDefaultCommunicationsRecordingDeviceEnabled

Gets or sets a telemetry flag stating if voice communications routing switches are active. Ignored in JSON.

[JsonIgnore]
public bool IsDefaultCommunicationsRecordingDeviceEnabled { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

IsDefaultConsoleRecordingDeviceEnabled

Gets or sets a telemetry flag stating if default console routing switches are active. Ignored in JSON.

[JsonIgnore]
public bool IsDefaultConsoleRecordingDeviceEnabled { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

IsDefaultRecordingDeviceEnabled

Gets or sets a telemetry flag stating if default multimedia routing switches are active. Ignored in JSON.

[JsonIgnore]
public bool IsDefaultRecordingDeviceEnabled { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

IsFormatEnabled

Gets or sets a telemetry flag stating if device format arrays are readable. Ignored in JSON.

[JsonIgnore]
public bool IsFormatEnabled { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

IsMuteEnabled

Gets or sets a telemetry flag stating if hardware mute lines are readable. Ignored in JSON.

[JsonIgnore]
public bool IsMuteEnabled { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

IsMuted

Gets or sets a value indicating whether input channels are muted.

public bool IsMuted { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

IsRecordingEnabled

Gets or sets a telemetry flag stating if recording features are active. Ignored in JSON.

[JsonIgnore]
public bool IsRecordingEnabled { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

IsVolumeEnabled

Gets or sets a telemetry flag stating if hardware volume lines are readable. Ignored in JSON.

[JsonIgnore]

Property Value

bool

Gets or sets the stream layout sample frequencies and layouts.

AudioFormatProfile

Gets or sets the discrete Left channel volume level percentage (0-100).

decimal
